docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,376.75 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ALABI, IBIYEMI (SUED AS ALABI BIYMEI) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ALABI, IBIYEMI (SUED AS ALABI BIYMEI)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-08-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALABI, IBIYEMI (SUED AS ALABI BIYMEI)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-05-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (GRACE M. GLENN) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALABI BIYMEI IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-02-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY GRACE M. GLENN. DEFENDANT IBIYEMI ALABI (SUED AS ALABI BIYMEI) APPEARED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER CONTINUED TO MAR-02-2026 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TO BE PAID THE SUM OF $5,200.00 IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $200.00 BY DEFENDANT IBIYEMI ALABI ON 2ND THURSDAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING IN OCTOBER UNTIL PAID IN FULL EXCEPT THAT DEFENDANT MAY AT ANY TIME PAY A TOTAL OF $2,500.00 TO RESOLVE THE DEBT ENTIRELY.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-07-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT ALABI BIYMEI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

DEFENDANT ALABI BIYMEI IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLET; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
